subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto him who hath believed in God, the Lord of Lords, that He may draw him through this Call unto the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن آمن بالله رب الارباب لیجذبه الندآء الی الافق الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
